title: Vanilla Banner Flags
description: Makes banners look like flags when placed inside item frames.
body:
![Small American house with a flag on the yard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07c59ff70395b3a629823ff9f77767615afe9e8f.jpeg)
![Some country flags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a223afe5890657de3f5c481b71b9de08406e2b8f.jpeg)
![Banner base visible from the other angle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/992a9585e0c103b0c05421aa9cac269f43e8ec68.jpeg)
Makes banners look like flags when placed inside item frames. Doesn't need additional mods. Also makes item frames invisible.
